mapper.insert: INSERT INTO iot_alarm_notify_config( tenant_id, org_id, rule_id, name, remark, enabled, email_enabled, sms_enabled, email_notify_channel_id, sms_notify_channel_id, to_emails, to_mobiles, is_delete, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{orgId}, #{ruleId}, #{name}, #{remark}, #{enabled}, #{emailEnabled}, #{smsEnabled}, #{emailNotifyChannelId}, #{smsNotifyChannelId}, #{toEmails}, #{toMobiles}, 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE iot_alarm_notify_config SET name = #{name}, remark = #{remark}, enabled = #{enabled}, email_enabled = #{emailEnabled}, sms_enabled = #{smsEnabled}, email_notify_channel_id = #{emailNotifyChannelId}, sms_notify_channel_id = #{smsNotifyChannelId}, to_emails = #{toEmails}, to_mobiles = #{toMobiles}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_delete = 0
UPDATE iot_alarm_notify_config SET is_delete = 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_delete = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM iot_alarm_notify_config WHERE id = #{id} AND is_delete = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT * FROM iot_alarm_notify_config WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND rule_id = #{ruleId} AND is_delete = 0
AND enabled = 1
ORDER BY id ASC
